channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GMBREW] Trading Window Closure Notice by GM Breweries Ltd
item.description:
GM Breweries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the 'Code of conduct for prevention of insider trading' as per SEBI regulations. The closure will be effective from April 07, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the publication of the company's un-audited financial results, i.e., April 71, 2026.

  • Trading window closure announcement by GM Breweries Ltd.
  • Closure in accordance with the 'Code of conduct for prevention of insider trading' as per SEBI regulations.
  • Effective from April 07, 2026.
  • Will remain closed till the expiry of 48 hours after the publication of un-audited financial results.
  • Closure to end on April 71, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.M.BREWERIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GMBREW] GM Breweries Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Approve Audited Results for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
GM Breweries Ltd has informed BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 09/04/2026. The meeting, which will be held through audio visual means, will consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter/year ending Mar 31, 2026. The Board will also consider the declaration of Dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-2026.

  • GM Breweries Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 09/04/2026 to consider and approve Audited Financial Results for the quarter/year ending Mar 31, 2026.
  • The meeting will be held through audio visual means.
  • The Board will consider the declaration of Dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.M.BREWERIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [EUROPRATIK] Euro Pratik Sales Ltd Acquires 51% Stake in Chawla Brothers for Rs. 32.20 Crore & Declares Interim Dividend
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Euro Pratik Sales Ltd, formerly known as Euro Pratik Sales Pvt. Ltd., has approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition is Rs. 32.20 crore. Chawla Brothers is a wholesale and retail business dealing in wall panels, premium laminates, veneer, and plywood. The acquisition aims to enhance regional presence, boost brand visibility, and enable deeper penetration in North India for the company’s products. The company also declared an interim dividend of Re. 0.20 (Twenty Paise only) per Equity Share for the financial year 2025-26.

  • Euro Pratik Sales Ltd to acquire 51% stake in Chawla Brothers for Rs. 32.20 crore
  • Chawla Brothers is a wholesale and retail business dealing in wall panels, premium laminates, veneer, and plywood
  • Acquisition aims to enhance regional presence, boost brand visibility, and enable deeper penetration in North India
  • Euro Pratik Sales Ltd declares interim dividend of Re. 0.20 per Equity Share for the financial year 2025-26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VINCOFE] Vintage Coffee and Beverages Ltd. Commences Commercial Production of 4,500 MTPA
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vintage Coffee and Beverages Ltd. (VCBL) has successfully commissioned an additional 4,500 metric tons per annum capacity under its brownfield expansion project for soluble coffee. This expansion has been executed at one of its wholly owned subsidiary’s instant coffee manufacturing facilities, located near Rachur Village, Veldanda Mandal, Nagar Kurnool District, Telangana. The company’s total installed production capacity has increased significantly from 6,500 metric tons to 11,000 tons per annum. The new equipment’s are expected to enhance the production by approximately 70% on per annum basis. The entire expansion has been funded through internal accruals, reflecting the company’s strong financial discipline, robust cash flows, and commitment to sustainable growth without reliance on external debt. VCBL has also commenced the development of a greenfield project for an ultra-modern freeze-dried instant coffee plant near Hyderabad, which is expected to commence commercial production next year.

  • VCBL commences commercial production of 4,500 MTPA under its brownfield expansion project for soluble coffee.
  • The company’s total installed production capacity has increased significantly from 6,500 metric tons to 11,000 tons per annum.
  • The new equipment’s are expected to enhance the production by approximately 70% on per annum basis.
  • The expansion has been funded through internal accruals, reflecting the company’s strong financial discipline.
  • VCBL has commenced the development of a greenfield project for an ultra-modern freeze-dried instant coffee plant near Hyderabad.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PNGSREVA] PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd Achieves 2.51 Times Revenue Growth on Gudhi Padwa 2025-2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd has reported a significant increase in revenue for the Gudhi Padwa festival in the Financial Year 2025-2026. The company achieved a revenue of Rs. 73.004 million, which is 2.51 times higher than the revenue of Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa. This substantial growth indicates a positive trend for the company.

  • Revenue of Rs. 73.004 million achieved on Gudhi Padwa 2025-2026
  • A Year-over-Year increase of 2.51 times in revenue
  • Previous year's Gudhi Padwa revenue was Rs. 20.818 million
  • Positive trend indicated for the company
  • Gudhi Padwa sales update for Financial Year 2025-2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KUANTUM] Kuantum Papers Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading Compliance
item.description:
Kuantum Papers Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, KMPs, Connected Persons, Designated Persons, and their Immediate Relatives. This closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, 1st April 2026, till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter/financial year ending 31st March 2026. During this period, the aforesaid persons are prohibited from dealing in the securities of the company. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter/financial year ending 31st March 2026 will be intimated in due course.

  • Kuantum Papers Ltd closes trading window for insider trading compliance
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Directors, KMPs, Connected Persons, Designated Persons, and their Immediate Relatives prohibited from dealing in the securities of the company during this period
  • Date of Board Meeting for the declaration of Audited Financial Results to be intimated in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KUANTUM PAPERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ECORECO] Eco Recycling Ltd Appoints CA Shri Uttam Prakash ji Agarwal as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Eco Recycling Ltd announced the appointment of CA Shri Uttam Prakash ji Agarwal as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director. The appointment is subject to the approval of the shareholders in the ensuing general meeting. Agarwal is a Chartered Accountant with three decades of experience in taxation, finance, and restructuring. He has worked extensively in areas such as statutory audit, income leakage audit, concurrent audit, stock audit, and companies audit. He has also provided tax and business advisory services to private equity investors, banks, investment banks, brokerage houses, and finance companies. Agarwal has been the youngest President of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) in 2009-10 and has been acknowledged for his commendable work in the industry. He is not related to any of the Directors, Key Managerial Personnel, or Promoters of the Company.

  • Eco Recycling Ltd appoints CA Shri Uttam Prakash ji Agarwal as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Agarwal's appointment is subject to shareholders' approval in the ensuing general meeting
  • Agarwal has three decades of experience in taxation, finance, and restructuring
  • He has provided tax and business advisory services to various financial institutions
  • Agarwal was the youngest President of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) in 2009-10

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ECO RECYCLING LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNSHIEL] Sunshield Chemicals Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Sunshield Chemicals Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the company's shares. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026 are approved by the Board of Directors and filed with the Stock Exchange. The date of the Board Meeting to consider these results will be informed as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

  • Sunshield Chemicals Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window.
  • The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will remain closed from 1st April 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the audited financial results are approved.
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider these results will be informed as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNSHIELD CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LAXMIMACH] LMW Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure Period
item.description:
LMW Ltd, in compliance with the Code of Conduct to regulate, monitor and report trading by Designated Persons and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of its trading window. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course. Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • LMW Ltd announces trading window closure period from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026
  • The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LAKSHMI MACHINE WORKS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IFGLEXPOR] IFGL Refractories Resumes LPG Operations at Kandla Manufacturing Facility
item.description:
Further to the disclosure dated 20th March, 2026, IFGL Refractories Ltd. has announced the resumption of operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, P.O. Gandhidham 370 230, Dist. Kutch, Gujarat. The company had previously halted operations requiring Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) at this facility. With this resumption, all product lines at the Kandla works are now functional. The company will continue to monitor the situation and take necessary steps to mitigate any impact, which remains beyond its control.

  • IFGL Refractories Ltd. resumes LPG operations at Kandla manufacturing facility
  • All product lines at Kandla works are now functional
  • Company to monitor situation and mitigate any impact

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFGL Refractories Ltd | Category: Business Update
